title: trifolium stipulare
intro: Trifolium stipulare, commonly known as the stipule clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This perennial herb is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium stipulare include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, as well as its ability to support digestive health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Trifolium stipulare can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
